summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bengali psychiatrist website. All core features working correctly including landing page, blog functionality, admin panel, and mobile responsiveness.

minor_issues.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for successful creation
Console warnings about missing Description for DialogContent

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (Hero, Transformation, Authority, Services, Testimonials, CTA)
Header navigation with Bengali links and WhatsApp contact button
Footer renders with contact info and emergency helpline
Blog page displays posts and empty state correctly
Single blog post page shows full content with back navigation
Admin dashboard with blog CRUD operations
Blog creation in admin appears on public blog page
All backend API endpoints (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE blogs, admin verify)
Bengali content displays properly throughout the site
